title: Account identification
description: Practice understanding of different account types: checking, savings, money market, CDs. Overview, pro's/cons, interest

assessment_items.question_content:
Banks offer many types of accounts, each with a different use and purpose.

**Which type of bank account would you typically use for everyday transactions?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Checking/debit accounts are a convenient way to keep track of your daily expenses. 

**What is a key benefit of having a checking/debit account?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: They make it easy to get paid and pay bills.
They can limit withdrawals, which can make it easier to save money.
They have no minimum balance or direct deposit requirements.

assessment_items.question_content:
Certain bank accounts earn interest. 

**Which of these bank accounts typically pays the least amount of interest?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Savings accounts come with various features, but one stands out as a key benefit. 

**What is a key benefit of having a savings account?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It typically provides higher interest rates than checking accounts.
It comes with a card for everyday use.
It allows you to withdraw money anytime without penalties.

assessment_items.question_content:
Savings accounts have pros and cons compared to other accounts. 

**What is a key benefit of having a savings account?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It comes with a debit card for everyday use.
They make it easy to save money while earning some interest.

assessment_items.question_content:
Bank accounts differ on many features, one of which is interest. 

**Which one of these accounts pay *less* interest than a savings account?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Bank accounts differ on many features, one of which is interest. 

**Which of these accounts typically pays *more* interest than a money market account?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Money market accounts come with various features, but one stands out as a key benefit. 

**What is a key benefit of having a money market account?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: higher interest rates paid compared to checking accounts

assessment_items.question_content:
When it comes to managing money, it's important that your financial needs are matched with the right type of account.

**Which scenario is the best match for opening a money market account?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: saving for a known future expense
saving money for a vacation where you'll need quick and easy access to your funds
investing your tax refund, knowing you won't need to spend it for at least a year

assessment_items.question_content:
When it comes to managing money, it's important to match your financial plan with the right type of account.

**Which scenario is the best match for opening a certificate of deposit (CD)?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: accessing your money while on vacation
investing your tax refund knowing you won't need to spend it for a year
putting away funds to pay quarterly bills

assessment_items.question_content:
Certificate of deposit (CD) accounts offer a wide range of benefits, but also have some drawbacks.

**Which one of these is a drawback of CDs?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: no access to your funds for a period of time
lower interest rates than most other bank accounts
can decrease in value if stock market drops

assessment_items.question_content:
Interest rates vary significantly among different bank accounts.

**Which account pays the highest interest rate? **

[[☃ radio 1]]
